title: SELECT-based quantification of site-specific m6A modification
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"en4pj","text":"This protocol describes SELECT (single-base elongation- and ligation-based qPCR amplification) assays for site-specific quantification of m6A RNA modification using total RNA, followed by qPCR-based detection of SELECT products.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"l5ska","text":"- Use RNase-free tubes, tips, and reagents throughout.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rpdfk","text":"- Prepare all primer working solutions in nuclease-free water.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ondeq","text":"- Thaw enzymes on ice and keep on ice until use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bw6bw","text":"- All centrifugation steps are performed briefly to collect liquid unless otherwise specified.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"gccp3","text":"- 40 nM Up primer**","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dh7s2","text":"- 40 nM Down primer**","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d6zpe","text":"- 5 μM dNTPs (NEB, N0447S)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"piq6k","text":"- 1x CutSmart buffer (NEB, B7204S)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lefdh","text":"- 0.01 U Bst 2.0 DNA polymerase (NEB, M0537S)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":29}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jub91","text":"- 0.5 U SplintR ligase (NEB, M0375S)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8hocy","text":"- 10 nmol ATP (NEB, P0756S)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"m8bqd","text":"- SYBR Green Master Mix (Applied Biosystems, A25742)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare the annealing reaction for each sample by mixing: 500 ng total RNA 40 nM Up primer 40 nM Down primer 5 μM dNTPs (NEB, N0447S) 1x CutSmart buffer (NEB, B7204S) Adjust volume to 17 μL with nuclease-free water.
Perform primer annealing using the following temperature program: 90°C for 1 min 80°C for 1 min 70°C for 1 min 60°C for 1 min 50°C for 1 min 40°C for 6 min
Prepare anenzyme mixture containing: 0.01 U Bst 2.0 DNA polymerase (NEB, M0537S) 0.5 U SplintR ligase (NEB, M0375S) 10 nmol ATP (NEB, P0756S)
Add 3 μL enzyme mixture to each annealed reaction to reach a final volume of 20 μL.
Incubate reactions using the following program: 40°C for 20 min 80°C for 20 min Hold at 4°C
Dilute SELECT reaction products five-fold with nuclease-free water.
Use 2 μL diluted product as template for qPCR amplification using: SELECT common primers SYBR Green Master Mix (Applied Biosystems, A25742)
Perform qPCR according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
The abundance of SELECT qPCR products reflects the relative methylation level at the interrogated adenosine site.
All SELECT assays are performed with at least three independent biological replicates.
creator: Xin Xu
